project.name: osdcloud-win11-deployment-lab
project.current_goal: Flexible Web-console-first OSDCloud deployment with an installed host-management bundle under C:\OSDCloud so deployment hosts can delete the source clone after setup.

development.purpose: Active checkout for code, docs, tests, commits, pushes, and deployment-facing validation.

deployment_clone.purpose: Current production-like checkout; old C:\Users\Davis\Documents\New project path is retired for new work.

host_management.purpose: Installed host-management bundle used by the deployment host after setup.

host_state.purpose: Mutable host-only state including local config, secrets, and staging after setup.

runtime.purpose: Product-managed OSDCloud runtime/install root selected in Web initialization; never located inside the Git clone.

development.summary: Installed host-management scripts now resolve config, secrets, and download staging from C:\OSDCloud\HostTools\State when running from the installed bundle.

repo_only.policy: Do not use repo-only as the primary remote or a new development starting point.

deployment_clone.required_update_before_tests: This active checkout is already the deployment-facing path; from any other clone, run git pull --ff-only origin master before tests.

runtime.allowed_mutation_path: Normal product workflow such as Web project-root selection, Runtime Readiness, Prepare runtime, endpoint sync, preflight, and deployment tests.

git.source_of_truth: Live Git state is authoritative; this tracked status file records workflow context and may not self-reference the commit that contains it.

before_development_work: Only run git pull --ff-only origin master when the worktree is clean and current remote state is required or explicitly requested.
after_development_push_before_tests: confirm this active checkout HEAD equals the pushed origin/master commit
forbidden: Do not use C:\Users\Davis\Documents\New project for new work.
Do not manually patch, copy into, or directly edit the Web-selected deployment project root.
Do not commit generated deployment artifacts or local secrets.
Do not write deployment runtime files back into the Git clone.

recent_changes.summary:
- Installed runtime scripts now resolve console config and deployment secrets from C:\OSDCloud\HostTools\State first.
- Download staging for installed Prepare runtime now stays under host state instead of the source clone.
recent_changes.verification: node --test tools/osdcloud-console/test/runtimeArtifacts.test.js passed 29/29. PowerShell parser checks passed for Restore-DeploymentArtifacts.ps1 and Set-OsdCloudIpxeEndpoint.ps1. Reinstalled C:\OSDCloud\HostTools\App and State, ran npm install plus npm run smoke from the installed AppRoot, then ran Restore-DeploymentArtifacts.ps1 from C:\OSDCloud\HostTools\App with -ConfigPath C:\OSDCloud\HostTools\State\config\osdcloud-console.json -LiveRoot C:\OSDCloud -DryRun -SkipPrerequisiteCheck and confirmed it completed without the missing pxeinstallPassword error.

recent_changes.summary:
- Fixed installed launcher/setup PowerShell quoting for OSDCLOUD_CONSOLE_CONFIG.
- Installed launcher now reads local overlay Web host settings before opening the browser.
recent_changes.verification: npm test passed 209/209. node --test tools/osdcloud-console/test/runtimeArtifacts.test.js passed 29/29. PowerShell parser checks passed for Setup-DeploymentServer.ps1 and Start-InstalledWebConsole.ps1. Reinstalled C:\OSDCloud\HostTools\App, ran npm install and npm run smoke there, then launched Start-InstalledWebConsole.ps1 -NoBrowser and verified the spawned PowerShell command line kept $env:OSDCLOUD_CONSOLE_CONFIG plus node listening on 127.0.0.1:8080. 172.17.148.140 is not assigned on this host; current local IPv4s are 192.168.88.1, 192.168.100.1, 172.17.144.1, and 192.168.100.1.

recent_changes.summary:
- Installed host bundle/state under C:\OSDCloud\HostTools.
- Setup and Web host workflows no longer require keeping the source clone after setup.
recent_changes.verification: node --check passed for config.js, deploymentProfiles.js, osImages.js, runtimeArtifacts.js, serviceController.js, and windows.js. node --test tools/osdcloud-console/test/runtimeArtifacts.test.js passed 28/28. npm test passed 208/208. PowerShell parser checks passed for Setup-DeploymentServer.ps1, Install-HostManagementBundle.ps1, and Start-InstalledWebConsole.ps1. powershell -File tools/Install-HostManagementBundle.ps1 installed C:\OSDCloud\HostTools\App and State on this host. npm install and npm run smoke passed from C:\OSDCloud\HostTools\App.

recent_changes.summary:
- Preserved Initialization Wizard body scroll and project-root focus across auto-refresh.
- Verified with UI tests, full npm test, and 5.5s Edge live-refresh check.
recent_changes.verification: node --check tools/osdcloud-console/web/app.js passed. node --test tools/osdcloud-console/test/webUi.test.js passed 9/9. npm test passed 204/204. Edge verification on http://127.0.0.1:8081 kept Initialization Wizard scrollTop=40 and activeElement=init-project-root after 5.5 seconds with the edited value intact.

recent_changes.summary: Committed the elevated-Web startup path, early Prepare runtime admin guard, and matching UI guidance plus regression coverage.
recent_changes.verification: npm test passed 204/204. Focused node tests passed for serviceController, runtimeArtifacts, and webUi. node --check passed for serviceController.js, windows.js, and web/app.js. PowerShell parser check passed for Setup-DeploymentServer.ps1.
